03   Logo & Slogan
Official Logo Variants
Primary — dark background
(recommended)

Reversed — teal background
Innovating Tomorrow, Today!
Logo + slogan lockup — dark
Innovating Tomorrow, Today!
Logo + slogan lockup — light
Never do this
· Stretch or squish the logo
· Recolor any element
· Add effects or shadows
· Place on busy images
Avoid at all times
Slogan Usage
On dark / navy
Innovating Tomorrow, Today!
Orange #FF8C00
On light / white
Innovating Tomorrow, Today!
Orange #FF8C00 (consistent)
On teal
Innovating Tomorrow, Today!
White #FFFFFF
Logo Rules
Do
  • Use on navy, white, or teal backgrounds only
  • Maintain 1× logo height as clear space on all sides
  • Scale proportionally — never stretch or squish
  • Minimum height: 24px digital / 8mm print
  • Use the transparent PNG for all digital placements
  • Request SVG source for large-format print
Don't
  • Place on busy photographic backgrounds
  • Recolor any element of the logo
  • Add drop shadows, outlines, or glow effects
  • Crop, rotate, or separate logo elements
  • Use a low-resolution version below 72dpi
  • Use a PNG with a black background — always use the transparent version
04   Voice & Tone
Brand Personality
Innovative Trustworthy Bold NOT: playful NOT: casual NOT: jargon-heavy
Voice Pillars
Confident & Direct
  • Lead with outcomes, not process
  • Use active voice — "We automate" not "Automation can be done"
  • State benefits before features
  • Numbers build credibility — use them
Expert & Clear
  • Technical credibility without jargon walls
  • Explain "what" and "why", not just "how"
  • Avoid: "synergy", "leverage", "holistic"
  • If you use tech terms, briefly define them
Warm & Human
  • Speak to real business pain, not hypotheticals
  • Partner tone, not vendor tone
  • "Your team" not "the client's team"
  • Empathetic to scale challenges
Global & Professional
  • International English, not US-only idioms
  • Currency and date formats adapt to audience
  • Avoid cultural colloquialisms
  • Formal but never stuffy
Before & After Examples
Avoid

"We leverage cutting-edge synergistic automation solutions to holistically transform your business processes."

Use instead

"We automate the tasks slowing your team down — so you can focus on work that actually grows the business."

Avoid

"Our professionals will attempt to provide solutions that may help improve your workflow efficiency somewhat."

Use instead

"Our engineers build automation systems that reduce manual work by 60–80% — with a clear ROI timeline before we start."

Channel Tone Guide
ChannelToneKey Rule
WebsiteConfident, outcome-ledLead with results; CTA in every section
LinkedInAuthoritative, insight-drivenShare expertise; avoid hard selling
EmailDirect, value-firstOne clear ask per email
ProposalsFormal, structured, specificNumbers, timelines, deliverables
SupportWarm, solution-focusedAcknowledge first; fix second
